posts.text: Akum Drugs - Q4 and FY 26 results and concall highlights - Q4 outcomes - Revenues - 1158 vs 1056 cr, up 9 pc EBITDA - 152 vs 94 cr, up 61 pc ( margins @ 13.1 vs 9 pc - significant margin expansion ) Finance costs @ 24 vs 5 cr PAT @ 81 vs 150 cr ( LY - Q4 had a tax refund of 74 cr vs tax outgo of 40 cr in Q4 this FY ) Adjusted PAT @ 83 vs 35 cr, up 134 pc Q4 Segmental revenues / EBITDA margins - CMO - 952 vs 840 cr, up 13 pc.
